chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No. D- 152 of 2023. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections as flag A. 2.For hearing of main case. 28.3.2023. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Jatoi, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Muneer Ahmed Channa, Advocate for private respondent. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Asstt: A.G. ====== An FIR Crime No.25/2023, U/S.365-B, 34 PPC was lodged by Mst.Waziran with P.S, Sehwan, with regard to abduction of her daughters Mst.Farzana and Mst.Nusrat, which the petitioners have sought to be quashed by preferring the instant petition before this Court; during course of hearing whereof, the Investigating Officer of said case put his appearance and recorded statement of Mst.Nusrat U/S.161 Cr.PC whereby she denied her abduction; copy of such statement is taken on record. It is stated by the Investigating Officer of the present case that recovery of Mst.Farzana is yet to be made; therefore, he is need of time to finalize the investigation of present case. It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioners that he would be having no objection and would not press the instant petition, if the investigation of the present case is continued by the Investigating officer with regard to recovery of Mst.Farzana, provided, the statement of Mst.Nusrat recorded U/S.161 Cr.PC is considered by him while submitting final challan of the case before the Magistrate having jurisdiction, which the Investigating Officer has undertaken to be considered in accordance with law. The instant petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
